properties.name: jentic.runtime.name
properties.description: Name of the Jentic runtime instance.

properties.name: jentic.runtime.environment
properties.description: Deployment environment label. Accepted values: development, staging, production, test.

properties.name: jentic.runtime.properties
properties.description: Arbitrary key/value pairs forwarded to JenticConfiguration.RuntimeConfig.properties.

properties.name: jentic.agents.auto-discovery
properties.description: Whether to automatically discover and register @JenticAgent classes at startup.

properties.name: jentic.agents.base-package
properties.description: Root package to scan for @JenticAgent classes. Merged with scan-packages.

properties.name: jentic.agents.scan-packages
properties.description: Additional packages to scan for @JenticAgent classes. Merged with base-package.

properties.name: jentic.agents.scan-paths
properties.description: Legacy alias for scan-packages, kept for compatibility with jentic.yml format. Merged with scan-packages and base-package.

properties.name: jentic.scheduler.provider
properties.description: Behavior scheduler implementation to use.

properties.name: jentic.scheduler.thread-pool-size
properties.description: Number of threads in the behavior scheduler thread pool.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.provider
properties.description: Message service implementation to use.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.uri
properties.description: Redis connection URI. Supports redis://, rediss:// (TLS), and redis-sentinel:// schemes.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.consumer-group-prefix
properties.description: Prefix for Redis stream keys and consumer group names.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.read-block-timeout-ms
properties.description: How long XREADGROUP BLOCK waits before returning an empty result (milliseconds).

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.max-stream-length
properties.description: Maximum number of entries per Redis stream before approximate trimming is applied.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.pending-entries-timeout-ms
properties.description: Idle time (milliseconds) before an unacknowledged pending entry is eligible for redelivery.

properties.name: jentic.messaging.redis.max-delivery-attempts
properties.description: Number of failed delivery attempts before a message is moved to the dead-letter queue.

properties.name: jentic.directory.provider
properties.description: Agent directory implementation to use.

properties.name: jentic.directory.jdbc.url
properties.description: JDBC connection URL. Required when jentic.directory.provider=jdbc.

properties.name: jentic.directory.jdbc.username
properties.description: Database username.

properties.name: jentic.directory.jdbc.password
properties.description: Database password.

properties.name: jentic.directory.jdbc.pool-size
properties.description: HikariCP connection pool size.

properties.name: jentic.llm.provider
properties.description: LLM provider to auto-configure. Requires jentic-adapters on the classpath for any value other than 'none'.

properties.name: jentic.llm.api-key
properties.description: API key for the configured LLM provider. Required for openai and anthropic. Use ${OPENAI_API_KEY} or ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY} to read from environment variables.

properties.name: jentic.llm.model
properties.description: Model name to use. Defaults: openai=gpt-4o-mini, anthropic=claude-3-haiku-20240307, ollama=llama3.2.

properties.name: jentic.llm.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the LLM server. Used only by the ollama provider.

values.description: No LLM provider. Runtime starts without LLM support (default).
OpenAI provider. Requires jentic.llm.api-key and jentic-adapters on the classpath.
Anthropic provider. Requires jentic.llm.api-key and jentic-adapters on the classpath.
Ollama local provider. No API key required. Requires jentic-adapters on the classpath.
In-memory message bus (default, suitable for single-node).
Redis Streams adapter (distributed, at-least-once). Requires lettuce-core on the classpath and jentic.messaging.redis.uri to be set.
JDBC-backed agent directory. Requires jentic-adapters-persistence on the classpath and jentic.directory.jdbc.url to be set.
